page.title: Marbella Hen Party Yacht Budget: Real 2026 Breakdown

data.meta_description: Plan your Marbella hen party yacht budget for 2026. Real costs from €749/2h on Astondoa 40. Includes skipper, drinks, and VAT. Book now.
data.summary: A transparent 2026 budget breakdown for a Marbella hen party yacht charter, with real prices starting at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40. Includes all taxes, skipper, drinks, and snacks with no hidden fees.
key_facts: Marbella hen party yacht budget starts at €749 for 2 hours on Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39.
All prices include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%).
No hidden fees: what you see is what you pay, from €749/2h to €2,299/8h.
Larger yachts like Mangusta 80 start at €4,719 for 4 hours, with a free jet ski included.
All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's luxury marina.
Maximum capacity ranges from 5 to 12 guests depending on the yacht chosen.
Book via WhatsApp for pricing on other yachts not listed in Tier A or B.

faq.q: What is the cheapest yacht for a hen party in Marbella?
faq.a: The most affordable option is the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, both priced at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours. These yachts accommodate up to 11 guests and include a skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and all taxes.

faq.q: What is included in the Marbella hen party yacht budget?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). There are no extra charges for these items.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and decorations on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food, cakes, and decorations. We provide the drinks and snacks, but feel free to add your own touch to make the hen party special.

faq.q: How many guests can we have on a hen party yacht?
faq.a: Capacity varies by yacht: the Astondoa 40 holds up to 9 guests, Azimut 39 up to 11, Mangusta 80 up to 12, and smaller boats like the Dubhe (5 guests) or Speedboat (6 guests). Choose based on your group size.

faq.q: Do we need to pay extra for the skipper or fuel?
faq.a: No, the skipper and fuel are included in the price. There are no hidden costs. The price you see is the final price, covering everything for the charter duration.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for a hen party yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: The best months are May to October, with average temperatures of 25-30°C and calm seas. June, July, and August are peak season, so book early. April and November can also work with lighter crowds.

faq.q: How do I book a hen party yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: You can book directly via WhatsApp for any yacht. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), prices are fixed online. For other yachts, we provide a custom quote within minutes.

faq.q: Where do the yachts depart from?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's most famous marina. It's easy to reach by taxi from Marbella town (10 minutes) or Málaga airport (45 minutes).

data.body_html:
Planning a Marbella hen party and wondering about the real costs? For 2026, our transparent pricing means no hidden fees, no surprises. A 2-hour charter on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 starts at just €749, including skipper, drinks, and taxes. Here's exactly what you need to budget for a hen party yacht in Marbella.

Marbella Hen Party Yacht Budget: Tier A (€749–€2,299)

Our most popular hen party options are the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) and Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax). Both are priced at €749 for 2 hours, €1,099 for 3 hours, €1,499 for 4 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. This is the complete price: skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and 21% Spanish VAT are all included. No tipping required, no extras.

Larger Groups: Mangusta 80 (€4,719 for 4 hours)

If your hen party has up to 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) is the ultimate choice. It starts at €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter, and includes a free jet ski. This price also covers the same inclusions: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT. It's a premium experience for a special celebration.

Other Yachts: Pricing on Request

We have a fleet of over 20 yachts, from the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) to the Bandido (11.5m, 8 pax). For these, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp. Simply tell us your group size, preferred duration, and budget, and we'll provide a custom quote within minutes. All include the same transparent inclusions.

What's Included in Every Charter

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel for the entire charter
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (chips, nuts, olives)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) – no hidden taxes

You are welcome to bring your own food, cake, decorations, or music. The skipper handles navigation, so you can relax and celebrate.

Sample Budget for a 4-Hour Hen Party

ItemCost
Astondoa 40 (4 hours)€1,499
Skipper (included)€0
Drinks & snacks (included)€0
Fuel (included)€0
VAT (included)€0
Total€1,499

For 11 guests, that's just €136 per person for a luxury yacht experience in Puerto Banús.

Best Time to Book for 2026

Peak season (June–August) sees high demand, so book at least 2–3 months ahead. Shoulder months (May, September, October) offer pleasant weather (25–30°C) and easier availability. Weekday charters are often cheaper than weekends. All departures are from Puerto Banús, a 10-minute taxi from Marbella centre.

How to Plan Your Hen Party Yacht Day

Most charters include a cruise along the Marbella coastline, past the Golden Mile, with stops for swimming at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. You can also anchor near Cabopino for a beach break. Bring your own playlist, decorations, and food. The skipper can recommend the best spots.

Frequently asked questions

What is the cheapest yacht for a hen party in Marbella?

The most affordable option is the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, both priced at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours. These yachts accommodate up to 11 guests and include a skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and all taxes.

What is included in the Marbella hen party yacht budget?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish VAT (21%). There are no extra charges for these items.

Can we bring our own food and decorations on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food, cakes, and decorations. We provide the drinks and snacks, but feel free to add your own touch to make the hen party special.

How many guests can we have on a hen party yacht?

Capacity varies by yacht: the Astondoa 40 holds up to 9 guests, Azimut 39 up to 11, Mangusta 80 up to 12, and smaller boats like the Dubhe (5 guests) or Speedboat (6 guests). Choose based on your group size.

Do we need to pay extra for the skipper or fuel?

No, the skipper and fuel are included in the price. There are no hidden costs. The price you see is the final price, covering everything for the charter duration.

What is the best time of year for a hen party yacht in Marbella?

The best months are May to October, with average temperatures of 25-30°C and calm seas. June, July, and August are peak season, so book early. April and November can also work with lighter crowds.

How do I book a hen party yacht in Marbella?

You can book directly via WhatsApp for any yacht. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), prices are fixed online. For other yachts, we provide a custom quote within minutes.

Where do the yachts depart from?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's most famous marina. It's easy to reach by taxi from Marbella town (10 minutes) or Málaga airport (45 minutes).

Ready to book your Marbella hen party yacht? Check our full fleet and choose your perfect boat. For Tier A yachts, the price is fixed and transparent. For any other yacht, message us on WhatsApp for a quick quote. No hidden fees, just a perfect day on the water.
